rulings.Case Title: IN RE: QUALITY LOAN SERVICE CORP. IN RE: 52 TEDDY AVENUE
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing And Claim For Surplus Funds; Verification; Memorandum; Declaration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 02, 2019 line 1. rulings.Case Title: PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SHUI KING KWON HOM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Tax Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 02, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT STEPHEN HOM, ADMINISTRATOR OF THE ESTATE OF SHUI Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Tax Costs CONTINUED to May 14, 2019 at 9:30 a.m. Defendant to provide curtesy copies of the moving papers and the reply to department 501. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL VS. MARIA T GUERRERO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order Setting Aside Default Judgment And Entry Of Default
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 02, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANT MARIA GUERRERO, AMALIA GUERRERO, JOSE GUERRERO Notice Of Motion For Order Setting Aside Default Judgment And Entry Of Default DENIED. Defendants are not entitled to legal relief under CCP § 473(b) and Defendants have not sustained their burden that they are entitled to equitable relief. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: PHYLLIS SPARKS-MAGDALUYO VS. NEW PENN FINANCIAL, LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 02, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANT NEW PENN FINANCIAL, LLC, THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, in part and SUSTAINED, in part. Plaintiff's first, fourth, and fifth causes of action state facts sufficient to constitute a cause of action against Defendants; Plaintiff has standing under the first cause of action (Yvanova v. New Century Mortgage Corp. (2016) 62 Cal.4th 919, 939, 942-43). The Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the second and third causes of action in order for Plaintiff to address the statute of limitations. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: OLD NAVY, LLC VS. SF PACIFIC PLACE ACQUISITION LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 02, 2019 line 5. Demurrer To Cross-Complaint OFF CALENDAR per request of the parties. Parties to present proposed order on their stipulation to file a First Amended Cross-Complaint. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: FRANCOIS VARNAY VS. STEVEN RAPPORT ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 02, 2019 line 6. DEFENDANT STEVEN RAPPORT DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR. Dismissal of the entire action on file. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ADAIR LARA VS. PETER MENCHINI ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 02, 2019 line 7. DEFENDANT ALLISON MATAMOROS, KEVIN BARD, LARYSA VOLYNETS DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED. Plaintiff states facts sufficient to constitute a cause of action for unlawful detainer. Defendants fail to provide any authority that a rent notice does not meet the statutory requirements of CCP § 1161(2) when the notice provided no way for subtenants to cure the default pursuant to Civil Code § 1947.3. = (501/CFH)
